description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image and a before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the project root. Define two stages, build and test. In the build stage add a build job that uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME storing the build and .gradle directories with a push policy, and runs the command gradle --build-cache --no-daemon assemble. In the test stage add a test job that uses the same cache with a pull policy and runs gradle --no-daemon check. No services, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
